keyPoints: Method of steepest ascent/descent - changes the direction of descent after each iteration
Nelder-Mead (NR) method - uses a simplex search algorithm to find the minimum
Gradient Descent (GD) - uses the gradient of the function to find the minimum
Mini-batch Gradient Descent (MBGD) - uses a subset of the data at each iteration
Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) - uses a single data point at each iteration
